get_transaction_details.description: Retrieve all available transaction fields from the Transaction Tracker database for a given document ID. Returns a dictionary of field names and values, or an empty dict if the document ID does not exist.

document_id.description: The unique document ID of the transaction to look up (e.g. TXN-001).

get_tenant_id.description: Retrieve the tenant identifier from the Transaction Tracker database for the transaction with the given document ID. Returns a dict with a 'tenant_id' key, or an empty dict if the document ID does not exist.

document_id.description: The unique document ID of the transaction whose processing tenant is required (e.g. TXN-001).
